creator: freebsd@oldach.net
text:
(In reply to Zsolt Udvari from comment #14)
> Error: Orphaned: /var/db/rkhunter/tmp/group
> Error: Orphaned: /var/db/rkhunter/tmp/passwd

These are handled by the respective @postunexec

> Error: Orphaned: @dir /var/lib

This is created in stage but not installed, so it should be no concern.
